panel_desc: Specialized in Odoo Enterprise customization. Python modules, OWL, QWeb and ERP solutions for Mexican companies.
about_p1: I am a Software Technology Engineering student at UANL (10th semester), currently working as an Odoo Technical Consultant at Integra Informática Administrativa. I specialize in custom module development for Odoo 17, 18 and 19, solving real accounting, collections, payroll and inventory problems for Mexican companies.
about_p2: My focus is on understanding the business process before writing code: every module I develop automates something that was previously done manually. I work with Python on the backend, OWL on the frontend and QWeb for reports, always within the Odoo Enterprise ecosystem.
exp_li1: Development and implementation of custom modules in Odoo Enterprise based on each client's specific requirements.
exp_li2: Payroll disbursement system compatible with 7 Mexican banks (Banorte, BBVA, Santander, BanBajío, Banamex, HSBC, Scotiabank) with automatic TXT file generation.
exp_li3: Follow-Up report module with dynamic overdue days calculation, integrated into Odoo's account_reports engine.
exp_li4: Collections commission wizard: calculation based on received payments (not invoicing), automatic Excel export with XLSXWriter.
exp_li5: Custom inventory replenishment system with configurable orders, smart buttons and custom states.
exp_li6: Sales order cancellation validations: prevents cancellations when deliveries, invoices or payments already exist.
exp_li7: QWeb CFDI invoice report customization with corporate layout and additional SAT information.
exp_li8: Google Drive integration for automatic document storage from Odoo.
exp_li9: Financial Excel reports suite: purchases, sales, collections and inventory with optimized SQL queries.
exp_li10: Client ticket management, bulk data loading and inventory administration in Odoo.
p1_desc: Odoo's standard report didn't show the exact overdue days per invoice. Module that adds an "Overdue Days" column dynamically calculated based on date_maturity, integrated into the account_reports engine.
p2_desc: Wizard that calculates salesperson commissions based on received payments — not invoicing — with date range filters, reconciled payment identification and tax-free base. Automatic Excel export.
p3_desc: Modules to generate bank disbursement files compatible with 7 Mexican banks. Support for CLABE, account and card numbers. Automatic bank layout generation in TXT and PDF.
p4_desc: Module that manages order delivery by zones from inventory. Groups invoices by zone and date, assigns driver, validates no duplicate deliveries and generates route sheet with customer signature. Automatic Excel export with delivery and collections report.
p5_desc: Validations that block sales order cancellation when deliveries, invoices or payments already exist, protecting the integrity of the commercial flow.
p6_desc: QWeb invoice report customization with corporate layout, adjusted product table, complete SAT information and additional fields for Mexican tax compliance.
p7_desc: Integration between Odoo and Google Drive for automatic document and attachment storage generated from the ERP, without manual user intervention.
p8_desc: Multiple wizards to generate Excel reports for purchases, sales, collections and inventory. SQL queries optimized directly in PostgreSQL for high-volume reports.
edu_university: Universidad Autónoma de Nuevo León · FIME
contact_desc: Do you have a process you want to automate in Odoo? Do you need a custom module? Write to me, I'd love to chat.
